---
name: Test request
about: Create or update tests (unit/integration)
title: "[TEST] "
labels: test, qa
assignees: ""

---

## Goal
Describe briefly what you want to cover/validate with these tests.

## Context / References
- Related feature / issue: #
- Related PR (if applicable): #
- Motivation (bug, missing coverage, regression prevention, etc.):

## Scope
Components / modules / endpoints / tables to cover:

## Test type(s)
- [ ] Unit
- [ ] Integration
- [ ] Other: …

## Scenarios & acceptance criteria
List Given/When/Then cases or representative scenarios:
- …

## Test data / fixtures
- Data sets, mocks/stubs required:

## Environment & tooling
- Local commands: `pytest` …
- CI jobs affected (workflow name, matrix, caches):


## Tasks
- [ ] Write/update tests
- [ ] Add fixtures/mocks
- [ ] Update CI (workflows, timeouts, retries)
